mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and corporate earnings deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 60 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent, or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real retail sales combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates robust consumer spending without monetary policy tightening pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to generate a positive rank IC greater than 0.04 over any 24-month rolling window, or returns are negative when retail sales rise alongside inflation.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-recession recovery phase reflects rapid capacity utilization and earnings momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The signal produces negative forward returns in over 55 percent of triggered instances during recovery phases, or the predictive power vanishes when applied to late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly nonfarm payroll additions exceeding 150 thousand signal robust economic growth and corporate revenue expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by more than 150 thousand in a single month
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 50 percent of months where payroll growth exceeds the threshold, or the signal shows no predictive alpha after transaction costs.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous federal funds rate hikes and declining housing starts indicate monetary tightening that suppresses interest-sensitive sectors and consumer leverage, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a positive return frequency above 60 percent during tightening periods, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in industrial production outpacing GDP revisions reflects supply-side efficiency and margin expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns turn negative when industrial production growth exceeds GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment alongside a static federal funds rate indicates economic deterioration that monetary policy is failing to counteract, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises while FEDFUNDS remains unchanged
failure_condition: The signal produces positive forward returns in over 55 percent of instances, or the predictive accuracy drops below random chance in out-of-sample validation.
